title: Anthropic rents SpaceX?
summary: Anthropic partnered with SpaceX to access Colossus, a major GPU cluster. The video argues that Anthropic lacks vertical integration in chips and infrastructure compared to competitors, and that the AI race is shifting toward control of hardware, energy, and datacenters rather than model benchmarks.
